subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'r-Rahím! We have manifested that which lay concealed in the eternal realm of pre-existence, and have sent down that which was treasured in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الرحیم قد اظهرنا ما کان مکنونا فی ازل الازال و انزلنا ما کان مخزونا فی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
